'''鈭歾h-t-m-z''' ('''kazhatmezoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:callet|callet]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-t-m-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:callet|callet]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-t-m-z
|-
! Lemma
| kazhatmezoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhatmezoko|thizhatmezoko]] || [[word:jizhatmezoko|jizhatmezoko]] || [[word:shizhatmezoko|shizhatmezoko]] || [[word:kizhatmezoko|kizhatmezoko]]
